likert: I feel my background is accurately represented in surveys.
Demographic diversity strengthens community decision-making.
I am comfortable sharing personal background information online.
open: Describe how your background influences your daily decisions.
How has your cultural identity shaped your outlook on life?
What aspects of your identity are most important to you?
yesno: Do you identify with a specific cultural community?
Have you ever experienced bias based on your background?
agreement: Demographic questions should be optional.
Representation matters in public data collection.

likert: I am satisfied with the quality of care I receive.
Healthcare professionals treat me with respect.
I feel comfortable discussing my symptoms with my doctor.
open: Describe your most recent experience with a healthcare provider.
What factors influence your trust in healthcare services?
How could your healthcare experience be improved?
yesno: Do you have a primary care physician?
Have you delayed care because of cost concerns?
agreement: I understand the instructions my doctor gives me.
Preventive care is as important as treatment.

likert: My education has prepared me well for real-world challenges.
I find learning more engaging when it connects to my interests.
Teachers provide constructive feedback that helps me improve.
open: Describe a learning experience that significantly shaped you.
What motivates you to continue learning?
How do you approach learning difficult subjects?
yesno: Do you consider yourself a lifelong learner?
Have you taken any online courses recently?
agreement: Practical skills are as important as academic knowledge.
Education should focus on creativity over memorization.

likert: I feel valued for the work I do.
My job allows me to use my strengths effectively.
I have opportunities for professional growth.
open: Describe what motivates you most in your work.
What qualities make a workplace supportive?
How do you balance productivity and well-being?
yesno: Do you receive regular feedback from your manager?
Have you worked remotely in the past year?
agreement: Collaboration drives innovation.
Work-life balance improves performance.

likert: I enjoy learning about new apps and devices.
Technology makes my daily life more efficient.
I am concerned about data privacy when using digital tools.
open: Describe how technology influences your work or studies.
What recent innovation has most impacted your life?
How do you evaluate trust in new technologies?
yesno: Do you frequently adopt new technologies early?
Have you used AI-powered tools in the past year?
agreement: Technology should prioritize accessibility for all users.
Digital literacy is essential in modern society.

likert: I prefer sustainable products even if they cost more.
Brand reputation influences my purchasing decisions.
I often read online reviews before making a purchase.
open: Describe a recent purchase that exceeded your expectations.
What motivates you to stay loyal to a brand?
How do you decide between price and quality?
yesno: Do you use subscription-based products or services?
Have you changed your buying habits due to environmental concerns?
agreement: Customer feedback should directly influence product design.
Advertising strongly shapes consumer behavior.

likert: I feel confident managing my personal finances.
I actively save for long-term goals.
Financial education should start in schools.
open: Describe your approach to budgeting or saving.
What financial decision are you most proud of?
How do you plan for unexpected expenses?
yesno: Do you regularly review your financial statements?
Have you ever invested in the stock market?
agreement: Financial literacy reduces economic inequality.
Debt can be useful if managed responsibly.

likert: I believe communities should support equal opportunities for all.
I actively follow social and political issues.
Public discourse today is more polarized than before.
open: Describe an issue you are passionate about and why.
What role should individuals play in addressing inequality?
How has social media shaped your views on social change?
yesno: Do you participate in community service or activism?
Have you changed your opinion on a major issue recently?
agreement: Constructive dialogue can bridge ideological divides.
Equality should be prioritized in policy decisions.

likert: I make conscious efforts to reduce my environmental footprint.
Climate change is one of the most urgent global problems.
I support renewable energy adoption in my community.
open: Describe how you incorporate sustainability in your lifestyle.
What motivates you to care about environmental issues?
How should governments encourage sustainable practices?
yesno: Do you recycle regularly?
Have you participated in any environmental initiatives?
agreement: Protecting nature should take precedence over industrial growth.
Environmental awareness should be taught in schools.

likert: I maintain a healthy work-life balance.
Physical activity is an important part of my routine.
I regularly set personal goals for self-improvement.
open: Describe your ideal weekend or leisure activity.
What habits have improved your well-being?
How do you manage stress in your daily life?
yesno: Do you meditate or practice mindfulness?
Have you changed your diet in the past year?
agreement: Well-being depends on balance across mind and body.
Healthy living should be a personal priority.
